title: signature
text: signature Description of the remote interface of a component or a modeled entity operation, which is used to access it at runtime. Signatures for Uniface components and modeled entity operations are automatically generated, but signatures for non-Uniface components that Uniface can call at runtime, must be explicitly defined. Related Links Signatures A Uniface signature describes the remote interface of a component. The interface enables other components to address the component without knowing anything about the implementation. This allows components of different origin to communicate through their respective interfaces. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
